task_context.actionable_question: When exactly did this student start disengaging?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Flag the exact week engagement dropped. Compare to pre-drop average. Recommend admin outreach timing.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The analysis reveals a significant decline in student engagement, with weekly clicks dropping from 86 in week -2 to just 5 by week 35. This downward trend indicates a concerning disengagement pattern, particularly marked by a drastic drop in week 2.

Insights: Significant Engagement Drop: The largest adjacent drop in engagement occurred between week 1 and week 2, where weekly clicks fell from 98 to 4, indicating a critical point of disengagement.

Educational implications: The drastic drop in engagement suggests that students may be struggling with course content or facing external challenges that hinder their participation.

Recommendations: high - Initiate outreach to students around week 2 to assess barriers to engagement. - Proactive communication can help identify issues early and provide necessary support to re-engage students.

insights.title: Significant Engagement Drop
insights.description: The largest adjacent drop in engagement occurred between week 1 and week 2, where weekly clicks fell from 98 to 4, indicating a critical point of disengagement.

evidence.context: Drop from week 1 (98 clicks) to week 2 (4 clicks)

educational_implications: The drastic drop in engagement suggests that students may be struggling with course content or facing external challenges that hinder their participation.

recommendations.action: Initiate outreach to students around week 2 to assess barriers to engagement.
recommendations.rationale: Proactive communication can help identify issues early and provide necessary support to re-engage students.

confidence.reason: The data shows a clear and significant trend in engagement metrics over the observed weeks.

required_core_outputs.description: Identify the specific week in which engagement dropped when the data supports one.
Compare engagement after the drop with the pre-drop average.

required_supporting_outputs.description: When a specific drop week is identified, recommend outreach timing relative to that week.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
